full_text:
Gao Yan 高焉
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gao Yan (高焉). Gongsun Zan alleged that Yuan Shao executed Yan as Shao was greedy for Yan’s property. Gao Yan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
